---
title: "The Rev. Charles Bice"
---

## The Rev. Charles Bice

**Dates:** (1844-1922)

### Description

Melanesian missionary, later Vicar of Murrurundi, NSW

### Biography

See Blain, <i>Biographical Dictionary of Anglicans in the Pacific</i> at http://anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
